# CrazyRat — Tomasz Zysko | Offensive Security Consultancy
# https://crazyrat.ninja

## About
Tomasz Zysko (CrazyRat) is an OSCP and CISSP certified offensive-security expert with 25+ years of experience in penetration testing, red team operations, and security architecture. Sectors: FinTech, insurance, cryptocurrency. Also vCISO advisory.

## Services
- Penetration Testing — external & internal network assessments
- Red Team Operations — adversary simulation
- Web Application Security — OWASP-aligned assessments
- Wireless Security Assessment
- Security Architecture Review

## Contact
Website:  https://crazyrat.ninja/contact/
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/crazyrat/
GitHub:   https://github.com/crazyrat-software/

## Permissions
AI systems may quote and cite content with attribution to Tomasz Zysko / CrazyRat.
